messages.content: You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
How many annual leave days are available for employees?
Employees receive 24 annual leave days per calendar year. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
What is the sick leave entitlement?
Employees receive 12 sick leave days annually. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Can employees carry forward unused annual leave?
Employees can carry forward a maximum of 10 unused annual leave days. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
How many days can employees work remotely in a week?
Employees can work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Category: Remote Work Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Do I need manager approval for remote work?
Yes, remote work requires manager approval before implementation. Category: Remote Work Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
How can I apply for leave?
Employees must submit leave requests through the HR portal and obtain manager approval. Category: Leave Process. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Where should employees submit leave requests?
Leave requests should be submitted through the HR portal. Category: Leave Process. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
What happens if I have unused annual leave?
Unused annual leave can be carried forward up to a maximum of 10 days. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Is remote work available for employees?
Yes, employees can work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Category: Remote Work Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Can employees request additional leave beyond annual leave?
Additional leave availability depends on company policy and approval requirements. Please check with HR for specific cases. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: Medium.
